title: SuggestionZ
description: Allow players to suggest new features for the server to the admins
body:
# SuggestionZ

A powerful and intuitive suggestion management system for Minecraft servers that bridges the gap between players and administrators.

## Features

### Player-Friendly Suggestion System
Players can easily share their ideas using simple commands:
- `/suggest <suggestion>` - Submit a basic suggestion
- `/suggest <topic> <suggestion>` - Submit a categorized suggestion

### Flexible Topic Organization
- Comes with default topics: gameplay, building, events, server, and other
- Server owners can customize topics to match their server's needs
- Add or remove topics with `/managetopics` commands

### Comprehensive Management System
- View all suggestions with `/idealist`
- Filter suggestions by topic: `/idealist <topic>`
- Paginated results for easy navigation
- Timestamp and player tracking for each suggestion

### Admin-Friendly Features
- Real-time notifications when new suggestions are submitted
- Permission-based access to admin commands
- Cooldown system to prevent spam
- Fully customizable messages and settings

### User Experience Enhancements
- Color-coded messages for better readability
- Intuitive command aliases
- Helpful usage messages

## Why Choose This Plugin?

This plugin transforms how server administrators collect and manage player feedback. Unlike basic suggestion systems, it offers a structured approach to gathering ideas that makes organizing and implementing player feedback significantly easier.

The categorization system helps prioritize suggestions and ensures that no valuable idea gets lost in the shuffle. With real-time notifications, admins can engage with player ideas promptly, showing the community that their input is valued.

The comprehensive permission system allows for team collaboration, letting trusted staff members help manage suggestions while maintaining appropriate access levels.

## For Server Communities

This plugin fosters a collaborative environment where players feel their voices matter. By providing an official channel for suggestions, you:

- Increase player engagement and investment in the server
- Discover innovative ideas you might not have considered
- Identify patterns in what players want most
- Create a more transparent relationship between staff and players

## Technical Details

- Lightweight design with minimal performance impact
- Persistent storage of suggestions between server restarts
- Compatible with Paper, Spigot, and Bukkit servers
- Requires Minecraft 1.20+

The perfect addition to any server looking to build a stronger community through player input!
